block_03: Asia trading cup kay phele 2 round khtum hu chukay hain, is ka mtlb hay kay bheteeen traders maidaan main chukay hain . Hum har haftay final round kay qareeb arehe hain, jis main pata chaly ga kay kun bany ga Asia ka no.1 trader aur kis ko hisa mily ga $5000 kay cash prize ko jeetnay ka kitni ziyada bhook hay jeetnay ki?
block_04: 3rd round kuch he dino main shuru ga , July 12 ko — is stage pay app adha safar tay kar chukay hain final cash prize jeetnay walun ki list main shamil hun kay liey!
